critical_issues.summary: Executor assignment conflicts with dynamic assignment rules for UI/component work.
critical_issues.evidence: Story assigns executor @dev and quality_gate @ux-design-expert; story template maps Design/UI Components to executor @ux-design-expert and quality gate @dev, and validate-next-story does not list @ux-design-expert as a valid quality_gate.

critical_issues.summary: Quality gate ownership is not aligned to the required UI executor mapping.
critical_issues.evidence: quality_gate_tools are present, but the quality_gate metadata itself is invalid for this work type.

should_fix_issues.summary: Dev Notes should inline enough TASK-P12/TASK-P13 component detail to keep implementation self-contained.
StatusBadge variant count conflicts with TASK-P12, which lists nine module variants.
TASK-P13 dependency changes for react-window and dnd-kit should be explicit in Tasks/Subtasks.
